name: Easy Potato-Leek Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Leeks, cleaned and sliced thin (including the white and light green parts)
3 1/4 lb Baking potatoes, peeled and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the leeks, onions, and broth in a pot.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce the heat; cover.
4. Simmer for 25 minutes.
5. Add the potatoes; return to a boil.
6. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
7. Process in a blender until smooth.
8. Stir in the black pepper.
To Serve After Freezing: Thaw as recommended. Reheat slowly, covered. Serves 12-14.
